testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Failed to decode response from marionette Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-7BULRO4', ip: '192.168.1.6' Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11',
